testcase.name: simpleFormDemo

failure.message: URL does not contain 'simple-form-demo' expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: URL does not contain 'simple-form-demo' expected [true] but found [false] at SeleniumJavaAssignment.TestScenarios.simpleFormDemo(TestScenarios.java:27) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1597) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1575) ... Removed 18 stack frames
